context: Cause:   introduction of air into the reaction vial √  activity in mouth (saliva), salivary glands, thyroid, stomach (mucus-producing cells), GI tract (direct secretion + intestinal transport from gastric juices), choroid plexus (b)  99mTc-MDP colloid Cause:   excess aluminum ions in generator eluate / patient ingestion of antacids; hydrolysis of stannous chloride to stannous hydroxide, excess hydrolyzed technetium √  diffuse activity in liver + spleen
